name: AAA Executive Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or news found; appears to be a tiny owner-operator limo service in the Evergreen, CO area. Possibly related to or confused with AAA Airport Denver Limo LLC (president Fode Abass Savane) but no confirmation of common ownership.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus contractor; 4-employee limo/executive car operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Golden West Limousine
districts_or_customers: Denver metro / DIA airport transfers (per related Golden West Airport Shuttle)
recent_news: No M&A activity found. USDOT 763817 registered in Arvada, CO. A related entity 'Golden West Airport Shuttle' (est. 1997) services Golden, Lakewood, Arvada, Wheatridge, Evergreen and DIA.
fit_notes: Limousine/airport-shuttle micro-operator, not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Sedona Town & Country
recent_news: No specific information found for 'Sedona Town & Country' as a transport operator. Sedona area is served by several small limo/sedan services; no school-bus footprint identified.
fit_notes: Almost certainly a small tour/limousine operation in Sedona; no evidence of student-transport contracts. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Shelton Transport
districts_or_customers: Likely Kayenta/Fort Mohave, AZ (Navajo County) area; freight, not students
recent_news: FMCSA/SAFER lists Shelton Transportation Inc (USDOT 2829634) in Fort Mohave, AZ as a 1-truck/1-driver interstate carrier. Kompass also lists 'Shelton Transport' at Kayenta 86033 (Navajo County). Both appear to be freight trucking, not student transport.
fit_notes: Owner-operator freight trucking, not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Freedom Wheels
recent_news: No M&A or growth news found. Distinct from Freedom Transit LLC (KC metro NEMT) and Freedom Wheels Transportation (SW Florida NEMT). Likely a micro NEMT/paratransit operator in Wichita.
fit_notes: Tiny 5-person NEMT/paratransit operator with no confirmed school-district contracts. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
